message:
fix(ci): handle Windows backslash paths in QuickJS module resolver and bench tests

The resolve_module_path() function accepted `C:/` but not `C:\` as a
Windows drive-letter prefix.  Bench and workload test helpers also
passed entry_path with native backslashes to QuickJS.  This caused 3
remaining test failures on windows-latest after the initial drive-letter
fix (926550e5).

- Accept both `/` and `\` after the drive letter in resolve_module_path()
- Convert backslashes in bench_scenario_runner.rs and ext_workloads.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
